name: whatsapp-business-agent-skills
tagline: Full three-phase agent skill suite for Notifyer by WhatsAble
description: Complete agent skills suite for Notifyer by WhatsAble covering all three phases of the platform. Phase 1 (setup-notifyer): account signup, login, WhatsApp connection, subscription plans, team members, workspace labels, and Developer API key. Phase 2 (automate-notifyer): WhatsApp message templates, AI bots, bulk broadcast campaigns, messaging analytics, delivery logs, and developer/IO webhooks for Make, Zapier, and n8n. Phase 3 (chat-notifyer): live WhatsApp chat operations including listing conversations, sending text/template/attachment messages, assigning labels, controlling AI bot vs human handoff, scheduling messages, and managing notes. All three phases are bundled together and required for full platform coverage.
author: whatsable

env.name: NOTIFYER_API_BASE_URL
env.description: Base URL for the Notifyer API. Use https://api.insightssystem.com. Must start with https:// — all scripts enforce this at startup.

env.name: NOTIFYER_API_TOKEN
env.description: JWT token obtained from skills/setup-notifyer/scripts/login.js. Required for all API calls across all three phases.

env.name: NOTIFYER_CHAT_ORIGIN
env.description: Optional CORS Origin override for Phase 3 chat endpoints. Defaults to https://chat.notifyer-systems.com. Only needed if you require a different origin header.
